name: CMS Provider Data API
description: The CMS Provider Data API provides access to Medicare provider data, including information about hospitals, nursing homes, dialysis facilities, home health agencies, hospices, physicians, and other healthcare providers. It supports querying, searching, and downloading datasets using DKAN-based endpoints.
